RAG Search Test Document

This document contains specific information for testing RAG search capabilities.

Project: DocsFlow AI Assistant
Version: 2.0
Status: Testing Phase

Search Test Data:
- Customer ID: CUST-12345
- Order Number: ORD-67890
- Product Code: PROD-AI-RAG
- Price: $299.99
- Delivery Date: December 25, 2024

Features Tested:
1. Document upload and processing
2. Text extraction and chunking
3. Embedding generation
4. Semantic search
5. AI-powered question answering

Performance Metrics:
- Average query response time: 2.5 seconds
- Search accuracy: 92%
- User satisfaction: 4.7/5 stars
- System uptime: 99.9%

Technical Implementation:
The RAG system uses advanced embedding models to convert document text into numerical vectors. These vectors are stored in a vector database and searched using cosine similarity. When a user asks a question, their query is also converted to a vector and matched against the document vectors to find the most relevant content.

Quality Assurance:
This document serves as a test case for verifying that:
- All text content is properly extracted
- Specific data points can be retrieved accurately
- Numerical values and dates are preserved
- Technical terms and acronyms are handled correctly
- Cross-referencing between different data points works
